docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, SANTOS AS TO DEFENDANT NAVARRO, CARLOS AN INDIVIDUAL DBA NAVARRO'S MARTIAL ARTS ACADEMY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
